title: Therapeutic potential of slow pranayama in anxiety.

assets.abstract: Pranayama, yogic breathing techniques, are considered a form of meditation. In classical yoga, the breath is associated with prana; thus, pranayama is a means to control the inner force, the prana shakti or life energy. Pranayama is more than regular breathing and if practiced in structured and methodical manner can reduce the body's physical symptoms of stress and anxiety. It has more recently gained popularity in the western world because of the many health benefits that come from a pranayama

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=26.0: links Breath/Soul concept to mechanistic neuroscience
